intro: Urban Sport coaching is delivered with Hello Padel Academy support, giving players in Grand Baie and Black River a clearer path from first rally to advanced match play.
partnerLabel: Hello Padel Academy certified in Barcelona Spain
whatToExpect: Correction of bad habits and mistakes
Improve to have more fun playing padel

coaches.name: Adam
coaches.tagline: Learn, play, and have fun with a Grand Baie-based coaching option.

coaches.name: Cameron
coaches.tagline: Junior padel clinic and coaching support from the Black River side.

levels.title: Foundations
levels.description: Built for newcomers, beginners, and beginner advanced players who are learning the basics and looking for cleaner racket preparation, positioning, and confidence with the glass.

levels.title: Match Play Progression
levels.description: Designed for recreational, average, and experienced players who want to become more consistent, defend better, and turn rallies into controlled attacking patterns.

levels.title: Performance
levels.description: For skilled, expert, and professional-level players working on the technical and tactical details needed for higher-level competition and regular coached practice.
